name: Onmoraki
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>陰</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>も</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>羅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ら</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鬼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card in your possession is destroyed by an opponent's card effect and sent to your GY, or if this card is Special Summoned from the GY: You can draw 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Onmoraki" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card in your possession is destroyed by an opponent's card effect and sent to your GY, or if this card is Special Summoned from the GY: You can draw 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Onmoraki" once per turn.
eff: If this card in your possession is destroyed by an opponent's card effect and sent to your GY, or if this card is Special Summoned from the GY: You can draw 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Onmoraki" once per turn.

sets.set: Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
